title: Fabulous Fences
description: Gives fences a fancier model, with unique textures for each variant.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ee58a8dbf16c13fa8d047c6d4861e1fada2b82d.png)
# Fabulous Fences
Gives fences a fancier model, with unique textures for each variant.

## Dependencies
- [**Continuity**](https://modrinth.com/project/1IjD5062) (required prior to v2026.1a)

## Compatibility
- [**LambdaBetterGrass**](https://modrinth.com/project/2Uev7LdA): Supports better snow feature
---
